title: What is my car EMI actually hiding? I asked ChatGPT my true ownership cost: AI’s estimate left me shocked
summary: While a car EMI of ₹16,000 seems reasonable, actual ownership costs can exceed ₹36,000 per month due to hidden expenses such as depreciation and insurance. ChatGPT gave me the entire estimate.

title: How much money should you keep in a savings account and where to park the rest?
summary: The 50/30/20 rule is a widely used budgeting strategy that divides your monthly post-tax income into three main categories: needs, wants, and savings.

title: RBI proposes tighter norms for recovery agents, bank employees; bars abusive language, blocking mobile phones: Details
summary: The RBI has proposed stricter loan recovery rules, including mandatory certification for recovery agents, safeguards against harassment, grievance redressal mechanisms, and compensation for wrongful recovery actions. Lenders also cannot block mobile phones over unpaid loans

title: SEBI proposes EPF-style investing in mutual funds — Here's all you need to know
summary: Sebi proposed allowing third-party payments in mutual funds for specific scenarios, with aim to ease investing while protecting against misuse, and includes provisions for social cause contributions. Here's what could change for investors…&nbsp;

title: How to create a family budget that works: Here is a step-by-step guide
summary: Analysing your spending patterns can feel stressful and may reveal some uncomfortable habits. Pause if necessary, but remain committed to uncovering the true reality of your financial situation.

title: 8th central pay commission: CPC panel invites applications for consultants — How to apply, eligibility, tenure, pay
summary: The 8th central pay commission has invited applications from eligible candidates to fill vacancies for full-time and part-time consultant roles on a contractual basis for fixed one-year in the commission.

title: EPFO: Is 24x7 support available for members? Can they contact via WhatsApp?
summary: EPFO has chosen WhatsApp to enhance member services, leveraging its extensive user base in India. This initiative aims to streamline grievance resolution, reduce legal backlogs and facilitate real-time communication for services such as PF balance checks and claim tracking.

title: Dearness Allowance: Maharashtra approves payment of DA arrears for state employees under 5th, 6th and 7th CPC
summary: Dearness Allowance: The Maharashtra state government has approved payment of DA arrears for state employees under the 5th, 6th and 7th central pay commissions. The total payout is ₹800 crore.

title: EPFO: You will soon be able to withdraw money from EPF account through UPI, Mandaviya says testing complete — Details
summary: EPFO subscribers will soon withdraw provident funds via UPI, with direct transfers to bank accounts. The initiative aims to streamline service delivery and enhance member access to funds, facilitating quicker transactions for various needs.

title: SIFs at seven months: baby steps now, broader risk canvas ahead
summary: Launched as a bridge between mutual funds and PMS, specialized investment funds have seen rapid AUM growth in seven months. The next phase may demand broader risk-taking and new categories.

title: Market Trading Guide: Buy Manappuram Finance and Apollo Micro Systems on Thursday for gains up to 8%
summary: Nifty sentiment is weak, consolidating between 23,400-23,800. The guide recommends buying Manappuram Finance (Target Rs 345) and Apollo Micro Systems (Target Rs 385) for near-term 8% gains. Both stocks showed strong bullish technical breakouts above resistance levels with volume support.

title: Households pull Rs 54,786 cr worth of equities from secondary markets in FY25; invest record Rs 5.43 lakh crore in mutual funds
summary: Indian households demonstrated a structural shift in FY25. They pulled Rs 54,786 cr from secondary equities but doubled primary investments. A record Rs 5.43 lakh crore went into mutual funds, nearly doubling total securities market savings to Rs 6.91 lakh crore, favoring financial assets.

title: NCDEX launches India’s first rainfall-based weather derivatives contract
summary: NCDEX has launched RAINMUMBAI, India’s first SEBI-approved exchange-traded weather derivatives contract based on Mumbai rainfall. Built with IIT Bombay and IMD data, it enables stakeholders like farmers, utilities, and lenders to hedge monsoon risks using a transparent, data-driven financial instrum

title: Rupee sinks to fresh record low amid dollar outflows and crude surge
summary: The rupee fell to a new closing low of 96.83 against the dollar as persistent foreign institutional investor outflows, rising crude oil prices, and global risk aversion weighed heavily on sentiment. Market experts warn of further weakness amid geopolitical tensions and continued capital flight.

title: Target doubles growth forecast, but cites caution as consumers remain stretched
summary: The $59-billion retailer has muddled through three straight years of declining revenue as cost-conscious shoppers moved to cheaper options. Its ​merchandise also failed to attract higher-income consumers looking for nice-to-have apparel and home decor.

title: Bosch Ltd Q4 Results: Net profit rises 3% to Rs 568 cr
summary: The company, which had posted a consolidated net profit of Rs 553.6 crore in the corresponding quarter of the previous fiscal, said its board has approved a joint venture with TSF Group firms Wheels India Ltd and Brakes India Pvt Ltd for the development and production of solutions for the commercial

title: US stocks today: S&P 500, Nasdaq open higher as chip stocks gain ahead of Nvidia results
summary: US markets opened mixed with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq gaining on a rebound in chip stocks ahead of Nvidia’s earnings, seen as a key gauge of AI demand. The Dow slipped slightly as investors remained cautious about elevated Treasury yields and their impact on valuations.

title: Apollo Hospitals Q4 Results: Cons PAT jumps 36% YoY to Rs 529 crore, revenue rises 18%; Rs 10 per share dividend declared
summary: Apollo Hospitals reported strong Q4 FY26 results: consolidated PAT surged 36% YoY to Rs 529 crore, and revenue increased 18% to Rs 6,605 crore. EBITDA grew 31% to Rs 1,011 crore. The company declared a Rs 10 dividend.

title: Teamlease board approves share buyback worth Rs 238 crore; to buy over 14.87 lakh shares via tender offer route
summary: Teamlease Services approved a share buyback of 14.87 lakh shares worth ₹238 crore at ₹1,600 per share via a tender offer, aiming to boost stock performance. The company also reported Q4 FY26 earnings: net profit grew 26% YoY to ₹44 crore, with revenue rising to ₹2,925 crore, alongside 109 new client

title: Quote of the day by Peter Bernstein: "Volatility is often a symptom of risk but is not a risk in and of itself. Volatility obscures the future but does not necessarily determine the future"
summary: Investor Peter Bernstein highlights a key distinction. Volatility shows market ups and downs. True risk comes from weak fundamentals or debt. Long-term opportunities often arise during uncertain times. Investors should focus on value and discipline. Temporary market noise is not permanent danger. Th
